brief_notes: Excellent paper. All numbers verified: 640 new + 4,026 public, 2,055 SEA, 751 in-house, 1,304 Pf6, 14 years/18 provinces, 79.3%/68.0%/46.1% coverage, 80% monoclonal, 44.3% predominant clone, 50.7% WAF monoclonal, n=701 unrelated, s=0.3, 80 gens, 33.3 cM, m=0.01, 10^3-10^4. Named citations (schaffner2018hmmibd, browning2015ibdne, malariagen2021pf6, etc.). Well-organized, clear Main Finding/Mechanism/Limitations framing.
